title: Why Calcium Absorption Declines After 40 (And What You Can Do About It)
seo_title: Calcium Absorption After 40: Why It Declines and What Helps
meta_description: Calcium absorption declines significantly after menopause, increasing fracture risk. Learn why it happens, what foods and supplements help, and how vitamin D and K2 make a difference.
tags: Bone Health, Calcium, Menopause, Osteoporosis, Supplements, Women Over 40
